manifest.title: ISOMan
manifest.author: aloks98
manifest.description: Self-hosted Linux ISO download manager with real-time progress and checksum verification.
manifest.tagline: Download, verify, and serve Linux ISOs
manifest.changelog:
* Add Cloudron `proxyAuth` + `ldap` addon alignment in packaging manifest
* Keep health check on `/api/health` and Cloudron runtime entrypoint on `start.sh`
* Add create-only authentication middleware (`POST /api/isos`) with LDAP-first behavior and Basic fallback
* Improve frontend handling for auth-challenged/non-JSON create responses
* Add create-flow credential prompt support and dialog accessibility fix
* Translate and refresh deployment/documentation content to English
manifest.postInstallMessage:
ISOMan is now installed.

Quick start:

1. Open the app and add your first ISO download URL.
2. Optionally provide a checksum URL for verification.
3. Access downloaded files from the `/images/` browser.

Runtime data is stored in `/app/data` via Cloudron local storage.
